name: 05_metrics_contract_transport_dev_transport_ramc
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_ramc' AS schema_name,
  'bkp_backlog_change_report' AS table_name,
  'MANAGED' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP) AS latest_observed_ts,
  CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  '' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_ramc`.`bkp_backlog_change_report`
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_ramc' AS schema_name,
  'bkp_current_month_job_snapshot' AS table_name,
  'MANAGED' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`CreatedDatetime` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`CreatedDatetime` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`CreatedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`CreatedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`CompletedDatetime` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`CompletedDatetime` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`CompletedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`CompletedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`CreatedDatetime` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`CreatedDatetime` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`CreatedDatetime` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`CreatedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`CreatedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`CreatedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`CompletedDatetime` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`CompletedDatetime` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`CompletedDatetime` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`CompletedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`CompletedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`CompletedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'CreatedDatetime|CreatedUser|CompletedDatetime|CompletedUser' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_ramc`.`bkp_current_month_job_snapshot`
UNION ALL

  'CreatedDatetime|CreatedUser|CompletedDatetime|CompletedUser' AS freshness_columns
